programmes.show_description: Alex has now been a trainee fertility assistant for two months and meets two couples desperately trying to start their families.
Alex learns about the hormone injections that 3,000 patients a year take at King's fertility to prepare their bodies for IVF, and meets 34-year-old Sharlotte who is freezing her eggs.
Shopping from Home.
The Art of Being Susan: Zoe Wanamaker stars in the frantic family comedy. With Ben away, Susan is invited to dinner by an art collector. Roger has an interesting proposal for Abi.
The Ego Has Landed: Popular sitcom about a dentist and his family. An unusual request from a couple whom Susan and Ben met on holiday leads to chaos in the Harper household.
Four Affairs and a Funeral: More domestic chaos in the hit sitcom. A death in the dentist's chair is not very good for business, or, as Ben discovers, for your private life.
Once More With Feeling: Comedy mayhem with the Harpers. Susan wants to renew her wedding vows with Ben, which is no problem for him - he just doesn't want to renew them with her.
Dutch Art and Dutch Courage: Domestic embarrassment abounds in the popular family sitcom. When a handsome millionaire reappears in Susan's life, Ben soon succumbs to jealousy.
Susan of Troy: Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker star in the frenetic family sitcom. The Harpers go on The Weakest Link, and Anne Robinson asks some very tricky questions.

Game show in which contestants face a giant version of a classic arcade machine.
Game show in which contestants face a giant version of a classic arcade machine.
Raz, Oscar & Korky: A Labrador puppy needs fitted plates and stem cell injections for elbow disease, and a Russian Black Terrier has a cancerous growth and is at risk of losing a leg.
Benji, Arnold & Kyte: Take That's Mark Owen brings some celebrity dazzle to the surgery as he arrives with his 18-month-old Doberman. Plus, a Coton-Tzu with a bad hip is brought in.
Bear, Ziggy & Noah: Sports pundit Lee Dixon brings his beloved rescue dog to see Professor Noel, while an owner comes all the way from Guernsey with her dog who is in severe pain.
Lola, Sandy & Moogi: Noel and his team help a giant Newfoundland puppy called Lola, and a golden Labrador needs a bionic solution for a deformed front paw.
Simba, Cato & Tynee: Persian cat Simba was hit by a car, and the complex treatment involves a skin graft and putting his crushed bones back together. Rescue dog Cato has a cancerous tumour.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: South Central paramedics race to a newborn baby with a low temperature, while crews in Oxford and Portsmouth deal with a man vomiting blood and a patient's mysterious hip pain.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: In Oxford, a 14-year-old boy suffers fractures from a football tackle gone wrong, while in Portsmouth, paramedics meet an 81-year-old woman who has fallen from her stairlift.
Twenty-one-year-old Ben needs his gall bladder removing as a result of losing 11 stone, while AJ is having an operation to free the painful compressed nerves in her toes.
Connie needs a polyp taking from her womb, Carl is undergoing keyhole surgery to remove torn cartilage from his knee and Brad is having a varicose vein stripped from his leg.
Think About the Future: The young midwives enjoy a night out together. Summah must think about her future on the ward, while Mollie is thinking about her future off the ward.
Piers Morgan travels to Lowell Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Rebecca Fenton, found guilty of the brutal murder of her husband.
Piers travels to Homestead Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Amber Wright, who at the age of 15 conspired with a group of friends to murder her ex-boyfriend.
Alex is hit hard by the struggles of patients going through IVF. After a previous miscarriage, Jasmine and Rumen are trying for a second child while Rumen is in remission for cancer.
Nearing the end of her training, Alex is allowed to assist in complex cases. She meets Holly who has a rare split womb and is attempting her sixth round of IVF with her husband Mark.
Shopping from Home.

programmes.show_name: Gemma and Gorka: Life Behind the Lens
programmes.show_description: It's a manic Monday as Gemma heads to a fashion shoot right after the school run. Meanwhile, Gorka lands a judging role on the Spanish version of Strictly Come Dancing.

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire.
Bolton: The team head to Bolton to help the Taylor-Mann family, whose nine-year-old son William has severe autism.
Bromley: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition.

The hit property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. Carson wants a Nashville pad of her own, but finding the perfect home could be tough.
More amazing property transformations with the Scott twins. The brothers help empty nesters Karen and Rick, who are looking for a deluxe retreat.
Bromsgrove: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the family of a two-year-old with a very rare lung condition.
Bolton: The team head to Bolton to help the Taylor-Mann family, whose nine-year-old son William has severe autism.
Dexter, Driver & Bailey: Noel treats handsome Dobermann Dexter, who has a serious spinal condition, and feisty feline Driver, who's been hit by a car, resulting in hip and knee injuries.
Moon, Milo & Ollie: Eight-year-old Dalmatian Milo's squashed spinal cord causes him constant pain, and Noel attempts to fuse four-year-old Shih Tzu Ollie's elbow in order to save his leg.
Betsy & Angel: Cockapoo Betsy was hit by a van five months ago and has developed gangrene, while bite-size bijou Dogue de Bordeaux puppy Angel has a genetic deformity.
Piers meets Jennifer Mee, once famous across the world as The Hiccup Girl, and now notorious as a murderer serving life in prison without the possibility of Parole.
